stemHtml: Isolated CBs have been forecast along the planned route. When flying in a layer of nimbostratus clouds, the pilots see a lightning flash. What actions should they take?

options.a: Report the lightning flash at the next waypoint, which is only 15 minutes away.
options.b: Declare a PAN PAN as the aircraft has flown into a storm.
options.c: CBs have been forecast, no further action needed.
options.d: Transmit a Special-Air-Report because the CB is embedded.
